name: cloud-migration
description: Assess workloads, recommend 7R migration strategies, enforce guardrails, score migration candidates, plan migration waves, estimate costs, and generate draw.io architecture diagrams for cloud migration programmes.

tools.name: list_migration_guardrails
tools.description: List all migration guardrails by category and severity

tools.name: add_migration_guardrail
tools.description: Add a new organisation-specific migration guardrail

tools.name: update_migration_guardrail
tools.description: Update an existing migration guardrail's severity or text

tools.name: delete_migration_guardrail
tools.description: Delete a migration guardrail by ID

tools.name: reload_migration_guardrails
tools.description: Reload guardrails from file after manual edits

tools.name: assess_workload
tools.description: Full migration assessment: score, readiness, 7R strategy, guardrail violations, effort and risk

tools.name: score_migration_candidates
tools.description: Score and rank multiple workloads as cloud migration candidates

tools.name: check_migration_guardrails
tools.description: Run automated guardrail checks against a workload

tools.name: list_migration_criteria
tools.description: List scoring criteria used to assess migration candidates

tools.name: add_migration_criterion
tools.description: Add a custom scoring criterion

tools.name: update_migration_criterion
tools.description: Update weight or direction of an existing criterion

tools.name: list_migration_strategies
tools.description: Describe all 7 cloud migration strategies (the 7 Rs) with indicators and exclusions

tools.name: recommend_migration_strategy
tools.description: Recommend one of the 7 Rs for a workload based on its attributes

tools.name: estimate_migration_cost
tools.description: ROM cost estimate: cloud annual cost, migration one-time cost, 1/3-year savings, ROI break-even

tools.name: create_migration_wave_plan
tools.description: Group workloads into sequenced migration waves respecting dependencies and scores

tools.name: generate_migration_diagram
tools.description: Generate a draw.io XML migration architecture diagram with native cloud shapes

tools.name: generate_assessment_diagram
tools.description: Assess a workload and generate a draw.io migration diagram in one step

tools.name: identify_red_flags
tools.description: Triage a workload for migration red flags (BLOCKER/HIGH/MEDIUM/WARNING) using AWS MAP, Azure CAF, GCP, Gartner, IBM, DXC, TCS, BMC criteria. Returns overall migration verdict.

tools.name: list_red_flags
tools.description: List all configured red flag definitions grouped by severity

tools.name: add_red_flag
tools.description: Add a custom organisation-specific red flag with a declarative condition expression

tools.name: update_red_flag
tools.description: Update an existing red flag's severity, title, detail, recommendation, source, or condition

tools.name: delete_red_flag
tools.description: Delete a red flag by ID

tools.name: reload_red_flags
tools.description: Reload red flag definitions from file after manual edits

tools.name: assess_containerisation_fitness
tools.description: Score containerisation readiness using 12-factor principles. Returns platform recommendation (EKS/AKS/GKE, ECS/Cloud Run, Windows Containers, or Not Suitable) and remediation list.

tools.name: assess_database_migration
tools.description: Assess database migration path (homogeneous vs heterogeneous), recommend target engine and tools, select downtime model (CDC/cutover), and identify database-specific risks.

tools.name: generate_migration_runbook
tools.description: Generate a structured cutover runbook with pre-flight checklist, strategy-specific cutover steps, rollback procedure, and 14-day hypercare plan.

tools.name: assess_network_readiness
tools.description: Assess cloud network readiness: landing zone, connectivity method (Direct Connect/ExpressRoute/VPN), DNS strategy, firewall rule complexity, private endpoints, and latency SLA compatibility.

tools.name: generate_portfolio_report
tools.description: Assess and summarise an entire application portfolio: readiness breakdown, strategy distribution, score heatmap, top blockers, cost estimate, wave count and programme duration.

tools.name: estimate_carbon_impact
tools.description: Estimate CO2 reduction from migrating on-premises servers to cloud. Compares on-prem and cloud annual kWh and CO2 kg using IEA 2023, Uptime Institute, and cloud provider sustainability data.

tools.name: assess_vmware_estate
tools.description: Assess VMware estate migration strategy: Relocate (VMC/AVS/GCVE via HCX), Rehost to native IaaS, Replatform off VMware, or Retain. Considers vSphere version, vSAN, NSX-T, certified apps.

guardrails_file.title: Custom Guardrails File
guardrails_file.description: Optional: path to your own migration guardrails Markdown file. Leave empty to use the built-in guardrails.

criteria_file.title: Custom Criteria File
criteria_file.description: Optional: path to your own migration-criteria.json scoring file. Leave empty to use the built-in criteria.

red_flags_file.title: Custom Red Flags File
red_flags_file.description: Optional: path to your own migration-red-flags.json file. Leave empty to use the built-in red flags.
